decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 7/9 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 52/3019 lines reworked (1.7%, 30/50). 0/31 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 1.4% (13/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 66. Session 12: 47 (process:40 efficiency:7 ttfw:0).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 240/240 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters use 2 different interfaces. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
